name: forge_doctrine_render
description: Render the full doctrine database as a single Markdown document suitable for publishing at docs.plausiden.com/doctrine. Pure projection from the typed TOML rules — no AI dependency. Per AVP-Doctrine rule docs-004: every architectural decision has an ADR; this command projects the live rule database into human-readable doc form so the published doctrine stays in sync with code-enforced doctrine.

out.description: Output Markdown path. Default: 'docs/doctrine.md' under the forge root.
